title: Quran, Sura 93: Ad-Duha
description: Sura 93 (Ad-Duha: The Morning Hours) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 93 (Ad-Duha: The Morning Hours) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: By the morning brightness, and by the night when it covers with darkness: your Lord has not taken leave of you, nor has He detested you.
